name: Nullpoint Advance
specialty: Specializing in complex, high-stakes undercity heists and sabotage, Nullpoint Advance has earned a reputation for their meticulous planning and ability to navigate the treacherous politics of the Undercity with ease.

members.name: Elara Vornis
members.note: Her icy blue eyes are a chilling reminder of the icy dome that keeps the Undercity sealed, a constant reminder of the life she's chosen

members.name: Zavok Grimstone
members.note: The scars on his knuckles tell tales of countless battles, a testament to his unwavering loyalty to the Argent Blades

visual: Clad in black leather and silver armor, Nullpoint Advance is a sight to behold. Elara, with her short silver hair and Zavok, a towering figure with a thick, unkempt beard, exude an aura of professionalism and deadly efficiency. They are often seen together, a silent and deadly combination.
reputation_note: Whispers echo through the Undercity, warning of the Argent Blades' enforcers, Nullpoint Advance. Hired for the toughest jobs and feared by the weak, they are a force to be reckoned with
